title: mammillaria stellaris
intro: Mammillaria stellaris, also known as the star cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Mammillaria, native to Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mammillaria stellaris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Mammillaria stellaris is often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
